title: Migrate Plexus to shared git-hooks submodule and remove local hook copies

comments.author: derek
comments.text: Starting migration to shared git-hooks submodule. Plan: move current uncommitted submodule changes onto a dedicated branch from develop, remove legacy .githooks, set local core.hooksPath to .shared-hooks/hooks, and validate hooks execute from submodule path.

comments.author: derek
comments.text: Migration progress: switched local hook resolution to shared submodule path (.shared-hooks/hooks), removed legacy tracked .githooks/pre-push from Plexus, and validated commit-msg enforcement now runs from submodule hooks (invalid message blocked, valid conventional message accepted).

comments.author: derek
comments.text: Committed migration on chore/shared-git-hooks-migration and opened PR #200 to develop: https://github.com/AnthusAI/Plexus/pull/200. Changes include adding .shared-hooks submodule, removing .githooks/pre-push, and switching active hooks path to .shared-hooks/hooks. CI checks are currently pending.
